title: Google TPU 8t and 8i is here..
summary: Google released TPU 8t for training and TPU 8i for inference, served through Virgo Network infrastructure. The video compares these ASICs against general-purpose GPUs and discusses scaling strategies affecting LLM serving economics at scale.
